description.value:
Prerequisite: Armor Proficiency (light or medium).

Benefit: Choose one type of armor that you are proficient with. While wearing that type of armor, your speed is reduced by 5 ft. less than usual. Further, your armor check penalty while wearing the chosen type of armor is reduced to -1.

Special: This feat may be taken multiple times. Each time it is taken, you must specify a new type of armor.
